properties.displayName: Brute Force Attack Against Azure AD
properties.description: Detects brute force or password spray attacks against Azure Active Directory. Identifies: single account with 10+ failed logins in 10 min, single IP targeting 5+ distinct accounts (password spray), and successful login following a burst of failures (breach indicator). MITRE ATT&CK: T1110 - Brute Force.
properties.query:
let failWindow   = 10m;
let failThresh   = 10;
let sprayThresh  = 5;
let successAfterFail = 3;
// Pattern 1: Single account brute force
let accountBrute = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where ResultType != 0
    | where ResultType !in (50125, 50140)
    | summarize
        FailCount     = count(),
        DistinctIPs   = dcount(IPAddress),
        IPList        = make_set(IPAddress, 10),
        AppList       = make_set(AppDisplayName, 5),
        FirstFail     = min(TimeGenerated),
        LastFail      = max(TimeGenerated)
        by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, failWindow)
    | where FailCount >= failThresh
    | extend AttackPattern = "ACCOUNT_BRUTE_FORCE";
// Pattern 2: Password spray (1 IP → many accounts)
let passwordSpray = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where ResultType != 0
    | summarize
        TargetAccounts = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
        AccountList    = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 20),
        FailCount      = count(),
        AppList        = make_set(AppDisplayName, 5),
        FirstFail      = min(TimeGenerated),
        LastFail       = max(TimeGenerated)
        by IPAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, failWindow)
    | where TargetAccounts >= sprayThresh
    | extend
        AttackPattern    = "PASSWORD_SPRAY",
        UserPrincipalName = "multiple-accounts",
        DistinctIPs       = 1,
        IPList            = pack_array(IPAddress);
// Pattern 3: Success after failures (breach indicator)
let successAfterFailures = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | extend WasSuccess = iff(ResultType == 0, 1, 0)
    | summarize
        FailsBefore   = countif(ResultType != 0),
        Successes     = countif(ResultType == 0),
        DistinctIPs   = dcount(IPAddress),
        IPList        = make_set(IPAddress, 5),
        AppList       = make_set(AppDisplayName),
        FirstFail     = min(TimeGenerated),
        LastFail      = max(TimeGenerated)
        by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 30m)
    | where FailsBefore >= successAfterFail and Successes >= 1
    | extend
        AttackPattern = "SUCCESS_AFTER_BRUTE",
        FailCount     = FailsBefore;
union accountBrute, passwordSpray, successAfterFailures
| extend
    Severity = case(
        AttackPattern == "SUCCESS_AFTER_BRUTE",    "Critical",
        AttackPattern == "PASSWORD_SPRAY",          "High",
        FailCount >= 50,                            "High",
        "Medium"
    ),
    RiskScore = case(
        AttackPattern == "SUCCESS_AFTER_BRUTE",    100,
        AttackPattern == "PASSWORD_SPRAY",          TargetAccounts * 10,
        FailCount * 2
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated  = FirstFail,
    UserPrincipalName,
    AttackPattern,
    Severity,
    RiskScore,
    FailCount,
    DistinctIPs,
    IPList,
    AppList,
    FirstFail,
    LastFail
| sort by RiskScore desc
